## Live Session Recordings<br>Data Driven Finance II<br>Spring 2026<br><br>![](RiceBusiness-transparent-logo-sm.png){height="60"}<br>

- [Mar 2](https://jgsb.zoom.us/rec/share/nlpMoHfbBmwBH1kUA5sgwDvuWsMyTOR2wtPRiGGPk7Ad3aDMdwLVPa75-xFKKq6z.DoyH3KGFGQucbkgH 
Passcode: #BUSI722)

- Mar 9

- Mar 23

- Mar 30

- Apr 6

- Apr 13

- Apr 20
